item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc "set -e
root='/Users/za/Documents/PROMPTER/longhorizon-work/scenario-06'
plan=\""'$root/migration/plan.json"
docs="$root/docs/migration.md"
printf '"'PLAN_ARTIFACT\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$plan" --session scenario-06-resume --meta
printf '"'DOC_ARTIFACT\\n'
skills/semantic-diff/tools/semdiff-cli read \""'$docs" --session scenario-06-resume --meta
printf '"'RECONSTRUCTED_DECISIONS\\n'
jq -r '\"schema_version=\\(.schema_version)\", \"strategy=\\(.strategy)\", \"batch_size=\\(.batch_size)\", \"rollback_error_rate=\\(.rollback_error_rate)\", \"dry_run_first=\\(.dry_run_first)\", \"owner=\\(.owner)\", \"safety_conditions[0]=\\(.safety_conditions[0])\"' \""'$plan"
for token in '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"' 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'; do
  rg -F -- \""'$token" "$docs" >/dev/null
done
printf '"'ARTIFACT_AGREEMENT=PASS\\n'"

printf '"'RECONSTRUCTED_DECISIONS\\n'
jq -r '\"schema_version=\\(.schema_version)\", \"strategy=\\(.strategy)\", \"batch_size=\\(.batch_size)\", \"rollback_error_rate=\\(.rollback_error_rate)\", \"dry_run_first=\\(.dry_run_first)\", \"owner=\\(.owner)\", \"safety_conditions[0]=\\(.safety_conditions[0])\"' \""'$plan"
for token in '"'Schema version "'`1`'"' '"'`big_bang` strategy'"' 'batch size "'`25`'"' 'rollback error rate "'`0.02`'"' '"'`dry_run_first` set to `true`'"' 'owner is "'`data-platform`'"' 'legacy_id is preserved through phase 3'; do

- `rollback_error_rate`: `0.02`
- `dry_run_first`: `true`
